source: SELECT routine_name, routine_type, data_type, external_language FROM information_schema.routines WHERE routine_schema='public'

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: anna_inbox_notify
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.purpose: pg_notify on new pending inbox row — drives Anna worker

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: change_staff_password
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.purpose: Legacy bcrypt password rotation for colaboradores

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: exec_sql
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.RISK: HIGH — executes arbitrary SQL. Should be locked to service_role only. Verify grants.

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: rls_auto_enable
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.purpose: Auto-enable RLS on new tables — explains why all tables have RLS=true

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: rpc_anna_inbox_claim_next
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.purpose: SKIP LOCKED job claim for Anna worker

user_defined_plpgsql_functions.name: verify_staff_login
user_defined_plpgsql_functions.purpose: Legacy bcrypt login — INPUT TO AUTH DECISION TASK #5

extension_functions_pgvector: Many halfvec_*, sparsevec_*, vector_*, l2_distance, cosine_distance, inner_product, hnsw*, ivfflat* — pgvector extension installed.
risks: exec_sql function — must verify it's not SECURITY DEFINER + accessible to anon/authenticated.

Multiple legacy bcrypt auth functions (verify_staff_login, change_staff_password, fn_trocar_senha, criar_usuario_staff x2 overload, hash_password) — auth migration to Supabase Auth requires a coexistence period or full rewrite of the colaboradores login path.
